component.name: RP6
component.summary: Touch-friendly pad controller for the Roland P-6 sampler

description.p: RP6 is a desktop GUI that drives a Roland P-6 (AIRA Compact sampler) over its class-compliant USB MIDI port. It provides a 4x6 grid of finger-friendly pads across banks A-H, transport and tempo controls, delay/reverb sliders, a per-pad effects rack, and a host-side step sequencer with SQLite-backed sequence storage.
RP6 can also run without the hardware attached, using a built-in sample-based emulator for testing and offline use.
